title: Google as content sites experience it (AdSense)

description.en: Google AdSense as the publisher experiences it: any site can join, ads auto-served from the same auction that powers Google Ads, ~68% revenue share to the publisher. The third side that turned Google from 2-sided to 3-sided in 2003.
description.zh: 网站发布者眼中的 Google AdSense:任何站点都能加入,广告由 Google Ads 的同一套竞价系统自动投放,发布者拿约 68% 的分成。这是 2003 年加入的第三边,把 Google 从两边平台变成了三边平台。
